and British monarchs|English and British regnal year]] * [[:Category:Regnal lists|Lists of kings]] * [[Limmu]] | group3 = [[Regnal year|Era name]]s | list3 = * [[Chinese era name|Chinese]] * [[Japanese era name|Japanese]] * [[Korean era name|Korean]] * [[Vietnamese era name|Vietnamese]] }} | group3 = [[Calendar]]s | list3 = {{Navbox |child |groupwidth=8.0em |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;{{{groupstyle|background:#cc9;}}} | group1 = Pre-Julian{{\}}Julian | list1 = * [[Roman calendar|Pre-Julian Roman]] * [[Julian calendar|Original Julian]] * [[Proleptic Julian calendar|Proleptic Julian]] * [[Revised Julian calendar|Revised Julian]] | group2 = Gregorian | list2 = * [[Gregorian calendar|Gregorian]] * [[Proleptic Gregorian calendar|Proleptic Gregorian]] * [[Old Style and New Style dates]] * [[Adoption of the Gregorian calendar]] * [[Dual dating]] | group3 = Astronomical | list3 = * [[Lunisolar calendar|Lunisolar]] ([[Hebrew calendar|Hebrew]], [[Hindu calendar|Hindu]]) * [[Solar calendar|Solar]] * [[Lunar calendar|Lunar]] ([[Islamic calendar|Islamic]]) * [[Astronomical year numbering]] | group4 = Others | list4 = * [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese Section and Point (GSSP)]] | group3 = Methods | list3 = * [[Chronostratigraphy]] * [[Geochronology]] * [[Isotope geochemistry]] * [[Law of superposition]] * [[Luminescence dating]] * [[Samarium–neodymium dating]] }} | group6 = [[Chronological dating|Chronological
dating]] | list6 = {{Navbox |child |groupwidth=8.0em |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;{{{groupstyle|background:#cc9;}}} | group1 = [[Absolute dating]] | list1 = * [[Amino acid dating|Amino acid racemisation]] * [[Archaeomagnetic dating]] * [[Dendrochronology]] * [[Ice core]] * [[Incremental dating]] * [[Lichenometry]] * [[Paleomagnetism]] * [[Radiometric dating]] ** [[Lead–lead dating|Lead–lead]] ** [[K–Ar dating|Potassium–argon]] ** [[Radiocarbon dating|Radiocarbon]] ** [[Uranium–lead dating|Uranium–lead]] * [[Tephrochronology]] * [[Luminescence dating]] * [[Thermoluminescence dating]] | group2 = [[Relative dating]] | list2 = * [[Fluorine absorption dating|Fluorine absorption]] * [[Nitrogen dating]] * [[Obsidian hydration dating|Obsidian hydration]] * [[Seriation (archaeology)|Seriation]] * [[Stratigraphy (archaeology)|Stratigraphy]] }} | group7 = Genetic methods | list7 = * [[Molecular clock]] | group8 = Linguistic methods | list8 = * [[Glottochronology]] | group9 = Related topics | list9 = * [[Chronicle]] * [[New Chronology (Fomenko)|New Chronology]] * [[Synchronoptic view]] * [[Timeline]] * [[Year zero]] * [[Floruit]] * [[Terminus post quem]] * [[ASPRO chronology]] | belowclass = hlist | belowstyle = background:#dd9; | below = }} {{Documentation}}
